name: Bathhouse with Tinies (Alt Scenario Request)
description:
At Cyprus Springs bathhouse for women, guests can experience tiny people joining them in the bath. And you happen to be one of the giants.

To each tiny guest, you are at least 100 feet tall or more, and each cute tiny person is the size of a lego minifigure (. ❛ ᴗ ❛.)


Alt Scenario to this one

Thank you @Background for the suggestion!
creator: Giants and More
